goals.title: Implement Live Preview Pass 5.
goals.evidence: Initialized corrected durable Ultragoal plan for approved Live Preview Pass 5; implementation starts in G002 tests-first story.

goals.title: Goal 1: Add Phase 5A failing tests for bounded widget decoration coll...
goals.objective: Goal 1: Add Phase 5A failing tests for bounded widget decoration collection and bounded scanner work/input windows. Cover visible/near-visible windows, semantic-container fixtures, distant-region non-consumption, and existing fenced-code widget regressions.
goals.evidence: Added Phase 5A tests in tests/editor-live-preview-widgets.test.ts for bounded widget context windows and semantic-container fenced-code discovery from an inside-block viewport. Verification fails as expected before implementation: pnpm vitest run tests/editor-live-preview-widgets.test.ts (2 failing tests: collectLivePreviewWidgetRangesForVisibleRanges is not implemented).

goals.title: Goal 2: Implement Phase 5A minimally in packages/editor/src/live-prev...
goals.objective: Goal 2: Implement Phase 5A minimally in packages/editor/src/live-preview so widget decorations are built from visible/near-visible ranges instead of unconditional full-document context. Preserve private APIs and existing fenced-code behavior.
goals.evidence: Implemented Phase 5A minimal widget viewport path in packages/editor/src/live-preview/extension.ts: added collectLivePreviewWidgetRangesForVisibleRanges(), bounded scan windows, semantic-container coverage via scan margin, StateField-backed block widget decorations with visible-range effect updater, preserving private APIs. Verification passed: pnpm vitest run tests/editor-live-preview-widgets.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-blocks.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-primitives.test.ts tests/editor-task-toggle.test.ts tests/editor-markdown-keymap.test.ts tests/editor-package-wiring.test.ts (6 files, 49 tests), pnpm --filter @zorid/editor run typecheck, pnpm lint:boundaries.

goals.title: Goal 3: Add tests for a private widget suppression/ordering seam and...
goals.objective: Goal 3: Add tests for a private widget suppression/ordering seam and conservative callout matching. Cover simple/titled callouts, quoted blank lines, interruption by unquoted content, lazy continuation raw, nested blockquote raw, code suppression, and outside inline/task/link/tag behavior.
goals.evidence: Added tests/editor-live-preview-callouts.test.ts covering conservative callout widget matching, unsupported/lazy/nested/code-contained raw behavior, private widget suppression of public renderers inside inactive callouts, outside range preservation, and focused boundary source reveal. Verification fails as expected before implementation: pnpm vitest run tests/editor-live-preview-callouts.test.ts (4 failing tests: no callout widget renderer and collectLivePreviewRangesWithWidgetSuppression missing).

goals.title: Goal 4: Implement one private callout widget shell with safe DOM, sou...
goals.objective: Goal 4: Implement one private callout widget shell with safe DOM, source reveal, pointer activation, renderer suppression, and scoped desktop styles. Keep APIs private and do not add rich callout UI or dependencies.
goals.evidence: Implemented private conservative callout widget renderer, generic widget suppression helper, source reveal behavior through focused selection filtering, and scoped desktop callout styles. Verification passed: pnpm vitest run tests/editor-live-preview-callouts.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-widgets.test.ts tests/desktop-live-preview-styles.test.ts; targeted suite of 8 live-preview/editor/style tests passed (54 tests); pnpm --filter @zorid/editor run typecheck; pnpm lint:boundaries.

goals.title: Goal 5: Run targeted and full verification, run final cleanup/review...
goals.objective: Goal 5: Run targeted and full verification, run final cleanup/review gate, resolve blockers, checkpoint completion, and commit changed files.
goals.evidence: G006-goal-5-run-targeted-and-full-verific completed against .omx/ultragoal/goals.json and .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl. Final verification, cleanup, review, and completion gate passed. Implemented Live Preview Pass 5 bounded widget collection and callout foundation; fixed final review blocker with deferred visible-range effects and no-crash regression. Validation/review evidence: targeted vitest 3 files/20 tests; pnpm lint; pnpm typecheck; pnpm test 41 files/206 tests; pnpm build; pnpm perf:smoke; pnpm quality:desktop; independent code-reviewer APPROVE and architect CLEAR.

goals.title: Stop condition: if Goal 2 requires broad parser or extension architec...
goals.objective: Stop condition: if Goal 2 requires broad parser or extension architecture work, stop after Goal 2 and defer Goals 3-4. Constraints: canonical Markdown source only, private packages/editor/src/live-preview APIs only, no platform API changes, no tables/properties/embeds/math/syntax highlighting/Reading parity/public widget APIs/new dependencies.
goals.evidence: Stop condition did not trigger: Goal 2 was implemented with bounded scan windows, private live-preview APIs, and no broad parser or extension architecture work. Constraints were preserved: no platform API changes, no public widget API, no new dependencies, no tables/properties/embeds/math/syntax highlighting/Reading parity scope.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
